# Lumina Design
> Cloud-based lighting design software for architects, electrical consultants, and lighting engineers.

Lumina Design is a professional web application that provides real-time lux calculations, DALI 2.0 automation, heat map visualisation, and professional PDF/Excel exports. It is designed for lighting designers, MEP engineers, and architects working on commercial and residential projects in India and globally.

## Product

- **Lux Calculations**: IES Lumen Method with real-time updates. Checks compliance against EN 12464-1 and NBC India standards. Status indicators: GOOD, OVERLIT, UNDERLIT.
- **DALI 2.0 Planning**: Auto-assign DALI addresses, calculate bus load, generate driver schedules.
- **Heat Map Visualisation**: 6-stop colour gradient heat maps at 0.5m grid resolution.
- **Floor Plan Upload**: Upload PNG, JPG, or PDF floor plans. Draw room boundaries with custom dimensions.
- **Professional Exports**: PDF (8-page report), Excel BOQ, or PNG. Client-ready output.
- **Fixture Library**: Standard and branded luminaires (Philips, Havells, Wipro on Professional plan).

## Pricing (INR, inclusive of GST)

- **Free**: ₹0/month — 3 projects, 5 AI calls/month, PDF export
- **Pro**: ₹1,179/month — 10 projects, 50 AI calls/month, DALI planning, Excel export
- **Professional**: ₹1,499/month — unlimited projects, 200 AI calls/month, branded reports
- **Free Trial**: 14 days of Pro-level access. No credit card required.

## Target Users

Lighting designers, electrical consultants, MEP engineers, architects, and interior designers working on commercial, industrial, healthcare, and residential lighting projects.

## Standards Supported

- EN 12464-1 (European lighting standard)
- NBC India 2016 (National Building Code)
- IES Lumen Method
- CIBSE guidelines
- DALI 2.0 (IEC 62386)
